{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011524EB28BD55B70C98DF36F7"}"},"total":231},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580041413465195326","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"简直是神来的。原以为是小yellow书，结果是神中神。作者笔力深厚，脑洞大开，约莫博览男频各大世界观的群书，还将哲学、科技修仙融入其中，信手拈来，太强了！","text_exts":[{"e":63,"s":59,"text":"科技修仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A7%91%E6%8A%80%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177419972498DF36F7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227580041413465195326%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504913078727756824%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A7%91%E6%8A%80%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764870545,"group_id":"7504913078727756824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iTbhsyUCc4yurgLWybe4SWYmSMcD9cSCDtdIum9aA7","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a2aa527bf8b141d3ad568ccf3fe2f5c8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789422&x-signature=2FveM0bq4R2vJ9dDNmP7f9CTUqk%3D","user_id":"3822376950445876","user_name":"你好呀，闪耀的黎明星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3822376950445876","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504913078727756824","book_info":{"abstract":"【一根筋高冷剑修年下攻 裴决 VS 温柔腹黑痴情师尊受 晏怀冰】
【古代+精品小说+仙侠+修真+师徒+年下+主攻+第一人称+小甜饼+脑洞向+救赎】
心魔劫里大梦浮生，方知自己不过是书里配角，犯下欺师灭祖的勾当。而我那明月般孤洁的师尊，则被废去修为，沦为炉鼎，直至神魂俱灭。
我一剑斩杀心魔，破境元婴，出关后却发觉这一切或许并非幻梦，而是即将发生的事。
*第一人称主攻。
*互宠，超级甜。
*有剧情线，微克系轻科幻。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14d7cdf90b90285422bb5b53e4ba89f3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"Cogito","author_id":"","book_id":"7504913078727756824","book_name":"知君仙骨","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"12.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":972,"name":"情感小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=972&name=情感小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7504913117617327129","read_count":"7219","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"81057"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"21","tags":"精品小说,情感小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14d7cdf90b90285422bb5b53e4ba89f3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383724&x-signature=mYMo95kOZ7avbVx%2BoxVcaaECq44%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011524EB28BD55B70C98DF36F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5773,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":9354},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572650264831001406","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很牛逼，看出来作者功底深厚了，无论是理论知识还是短篇幅内容却很多但很凝练，非常强啊，怀冰和裴决太好磕了，这两人真的很甜[爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763150104,"group_id":"7504913078727756824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"念白求安，约期待到，予定守约。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6QgBB78sENeyeh/k4AcLhY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a7ae1e16c9ef49a8b3d845735ff367d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795739&x-signature=ak5mMY3nzs7VUUM7bkw6XzrT8Ek%3D","user_id":"444624351275255","user_name":"念白雅黑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"444624351275255","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504913078727756824","book_info":{"abstract":"【一根筋高冷剑修年下攻 【古代+精品小说+仙侠+修真+师徒+年下+主攻+第一人称+小甜饼+脑洞向+救赎】
心魔劫里大梦浮生，方知自己不过是书里配角，犯下欺师灭祖的勾当。而我那明月般孤洁的师尊，则被废去修为，沦为炉鼎，直至神魂俱灭。
我一剑斩杀心魔，破境元婴，出关后却发觉这一切或许并非幻梦，而是即将发生的事。
*第一人称主攻。
*互宠，超级甜。
*有剧情线，微克系轻科幻。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14d7cdf90b90285422bb5b53e4ba89f3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"Cogito","author_id":"","book_id":"7504913078727756824","book_name":"知君仙骨","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"12.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":972,"name":"情感小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=972&name=情感小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7504913117617327129","read_count":"7219","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"81057"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"21","tags":"精品小说,情感小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14d7cdf90b90285422bb5b53e4ba89f3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383724&x-signature=mYMo95kOZ7avbVx%2BoxVcaaECq44%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011524EB28BD55B70C98DF36F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6180,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1502},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574093211131265854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"细糠，细糠！
舍不得看完！看过最好看的师徒言情没有之一！
搜了搜网上发现了未河蟹版，但这篇文的文笔好到，没有h情节依然觉得极美。写环境场景，寥寥几笔就让人身临其境，写感情互动，一句话一个动作，就能让人感受到蓬勃的情感。
情节嘛，时空啊宇宙啊，还蛮有想法的，不过还是感情戏最好看啦。
虽然作者可能不看这个平台的评论，不过还是想说，快写，照这本的水准，快写！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763484324,"group_id":"7504913078727756824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"突然下架这么多出版物，番茄伤透我心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzhow1ca9X6+LYRFm11lH8c=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6b856c1a835040068ed024778aa18e86~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791580&x-signature=Zq63FV8PJrNxDqP0yesfedhv3Mk%3D","user_id":"756899655465812","user_name":"爱吃烤韭菜的铁蛋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"756899655465812","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504913078727756824","book_info":{"abstract":"【一根筋高冷剑修年下攻 裴决 VS 温柔腹黑痴情师尊受 晏怀冰】
